summary: Focused frontend regression retest of FrontDesk KPI filter bug (iter8). All 5 click flows PASS with staff login (frontdesk@natmedsol.local). setFilter is now correctly defined at /app/frontend/src/pages/portal/FrontDesk.jsx lines 86-91 and KPI cards now write ?filter=... to the URL, the fd-filter-clear chip appears/disappears correctly, and clicking the same active KPI toggles the filter off.

test_results.step: fd-filter-clear visible, chip shows 'Filtered by walk in'
Click same active KPI again -> toggles filter off (URL drops ?filter)

critical_code_review_comments: setFilter correctly treats key === filterKey as a toggle-off (line 88), which satisfies the 'click same KPI to toggle' requirement.
Minor: the StatCard buttons do not have role='button' or aria-pressed to communicate filter state to assistive tech; ring-2 visual cue is present but purely visual.
test_credentials: frontdesk@natmedsol.local / FrontDesk!2345 — login returns access_token and redirects to /portal/staff
context_for_next_testing_agent: FrontDesk KPI filter bug from iter8 is now fixed and verified. setFilter defined at FrontDesk.jsx L86-91 correctly writes/deletes ?filter param and supports toggle. The only minor backend leftover from iter8 (POST /api/forms/send returns link=null) remains un-fixed per this iteration's scope (frontend-only retest).
rca of the issue: Previously undefined setFilter in FrontDesk.jsx has been added at lines 86-91: `const setFilter = (key) => { const next = new URLSearchParams(searchParams); if (!key || key === filterKey || key === 'all') next.delete('filter'); else next.set('filter', key); setSearchParams(next); };`. Confirmed via Playwright: URL transitions tested across walk_in, in_clinic, clear, and same-KPI toggle all produce the expected URL state.
